archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury & High Contrast (Premium Arcade Variant)
visual_direction: Black and gold cinematic gaming aesthetic, sharp digital arcade, premium platform. No rounded bubbly SaaS elements. No fake casino. No crypto/wallet language.

typography.instructions: Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use the recommended Google Fonts below. Apply strong typographic hierarchy.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white uppercase

layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style dense grids for game cards. No visual gaps unless structural.
layout_spacing.game_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3 md:gap-4

component_instructions.navigation: Sticky header (`sticky top-0 z-50`), `bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1A1A1A]`. Show standard Join/Login CTA for logged-out users. Show distinct 'Upload Game' CTA with user avatar dropdown for logged-in. Stack properly on mobile with hamburger.
component_instructions.game_cards: Dense cards. `bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#1A1A1A] rounded-none`. Image on top (aspect-video), title below. Hover state: `hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50` and slight gold tint on image overlay. Include `data-testid='game-card-{id}'`.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary: `bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#E5C158] border-none`. Secondary: `bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:border-white`.
component_instructions.forms: Account creation, login, and upload forms use sharp inputs (`rounded-none`), dark backgrounds (`bg-[#0A0A0A]`), and gold focus rings (`focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]`). Phone usability: use large tap targets (`h-12`).
component_instructions.game_detail_iframe: Sandboxed iframe container must be central focus. Wrap in a black container with a 1px subtle border. Patch notes and creator info stack below or in a 3-column split (2 col game, 1 col metadata).
component_instructions.creator_profile: Banner image across top, overlapping square avatar with 2px gold border. Split view into Tabs: Games, Clips, Communities.
component_instructions.legal_pages: Use narrow text containers (`max-w-3xl mx-auto`), distinct typography scale, and minimal distraction. Clean readability.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark wavy digital geometry for landing page hero background (set to opacity-20)

featured_game_1.description: Neon glowing retro arcade cabinet, useful for featured game thumbnails

featured_game_2.description: Black controller with red and blue ambient glow, good for action game thumbnails

featured_game_3.description: Vintage arcade machine interface, placeholder for classic/retro indie game uploads

community_cover.description: Abstract spherical shape in dark tones, perfect for community group cover images or user profile banners

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

accessibility_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast gold outlines for keyboard navigation.
accessibility_and_motion.hover_states: Use fast, sharp transitions (`transition-all duration-150 ease-out`).
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Text must meet WCAG-AA 4.5:1 contrast against dark background. Use text-shadow if layered over images.
